content.question: What proportion of Hungarian depopulating villages have the demographic and geographic characteristics (sub-2,000 population, travel distance > 25 minutes to next school) that would align with Portuguese closure scenarios? No baseline census data on rural school catchment distance has been cited.
content.reduction_path: Hungarian Central Statistical Office (KSH) or Ministry of Education spatial analysis of rural school locations, catchment populations, and inter-school distances in target depopulating regions.
